docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED JUN-30-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEGOVIA, RICHARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEGOVIA, RICHARD $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,100.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT DEFENDANT MAY RETURN ALL MUSICAL EQUIPMENT LOANED TO HIM BY PLAINTIFF WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER THE JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL, AND THEREBY SATISFY JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO AS TO DEFENDANT SEGOVIA, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
